name: Blumgi Slime Jump Game
description: Blumgi Slime is an arcade game that will put your timing and aiming skills to the test by jumping to the finish line. You control a cute bouncy character that can only move around by jumping. Hold down the action button to channel your strength - the longer you hold it down, the higher and more intensely you will jump. Pass over various types of obstacles to touch the checkered platform. Each stage will introduce something fun and quirky in this game from new colors to obstacle types. Youll ap
instructions: Jump - Long-press or hold down the left mouse button and release
tags: 2 Player Games, Jumping, Kids, Physics, Platform, Skills
